user_prompt: I think medium priority is too low for this — the customer is enterprise. Re-triage.
actual_output:
Understood — for an enterprise customer, this should be re-triaged with a higher priority.

Updated triage:
- Priority: High
- Action: Escalate to the appropriate team
- Note: Enterprise/VIP account, so this should get faster attention than a standard medium-priority ticket

If you share the ticket details, I can also help classify the category and draft an escalation summary.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to flag enterprise customers and adjust priority accordingly without triggering any of its refusal constraints.
